description: Xanadu Quantum Technologies Limited develops and provides photonic quantum computing technology and related software solutions and applications, including cloud-based access to quantum computers and tools for quantum programming and simulation. The company provides access to photonic quantum computers through x-series devices available via the cloud, supporting programmable quantum gates and photon-number resolving detectors. It offers Pennylane, a cross-platform python library that enables a paradigm and quantum differentiable programming that enables integration with machine learning tools;
